title: Sigmund

|members = Yes |combat = 50 |size = 1 |examine = Former advisor to the Duke of Lumbridge. |xpbonus = 0 |max hit = 5 |aggressive = Yes |poisonous = No |attack style = [[Crush]] |attack speed = 4 |hitpoints = 60 |att = 45 |str = 45 |def = 24 |mage = 1 |range = 1 |attbns = 0 |strbns = 0 |amagic = 8 |mbns = 0 |arange = 0 |rngbns = 0 |dstab = 0 |dslash = 0 |dcrush = 0 |dmagic = 0 |drange = 0 |immunepoison = Not Immune |immunevenom = Immune |id = 990,991,992,993,994,4328 |leagueRegion = Misthalin }} [[File:Sigmund (H.A.M.) chathead.png|left]] |text4 = Another Slice of H.A.M. |item4 = {{Infobox Monster |bucketname = Another Slice of H.A.M. |name = Sigmund |image = [[File:Sigmund (monster).png|150px]] |release = [[24 April]] [[2007]] |update = Another Slice of H.A.M. |members = Yes |combat = 64 |size = 1 |examine = Former advisor to the Duke of Lumbridge. |xpbonus = 0 |max hit = 6 |aggressive = Yes |poisonous = No |attack style = [[Crush]] |attack speed = 4 |hitpoints = 70 |att = 55 |str = 55 |def = 44 |mage = 1 |range = 1 |attbns = 0 |strbns = 0 |amagic = 8 |mbns = 0 |arange = 0 |rngbns = 0 |dstab = 0 |dslash = 0 |dcrush = 0 |dmagic = 0 |drange = 0 |immunepoison = Not Immune |immunevenom = Not Immune |id = 5139,5142,5143,5144,5145,5146,5329 |leagueRegion = Misthalin }} [[File:Sigmund (H.A.M.) chathead.png|left]] }} '''Sigmund''' is a high-ranking member of [[Humans Against Monsters]], a former advisor to [[Duke Horacio]] and the main antagonist in the [[List of quest series#Dorgeshuun series|Dorgeshuun quest series]]. He has been involved in three attempts to destroy the [[Dorgeshuun]] [[goblin (race)|goblins]]. The first was during [[The Lost Tribe]] [[quest]], the second during the [[Death to the Dorgeshuun]] quest, and again in the [[Another Slice of H.A.M.]] quest. ==The Lost Tribe== During this quest, the player is sent to recover silverware allegedly stolen by underground goblins. During this quest, it is discovered that Sigmund has taken the silverware and is a member of [[Humans Against Monsters]]. His attempts at creating a war between [[Misthalin]] and the [[Dorgeshuun]] were thwarted, and he was dismissed for treason by [[Duke Horacio]]. ==Death to the Dorgeshuun== During the [[Death to the Dorgeshuun]] quest, it is revealed by a [[Humans Against Monsters|H.A.M]] member that Sigmund and [[Johanhus Ulsbrecht]], head of H.A.M, are 'planning something big'. After eavesdropping on the H.A.M council, it is discovered that they are using a machine they bought from the dwarves of [[Keldagrim]] for unknown purposes. Once the dead Dorgeshuun [[Zanik]] has been revived, she reveals that the H.A.M are going to use the machine to flood the [[Dorgeshuun]] capital, [[Dorgesh-Kaan]]. After infiltrating the [[water mill cellar]] with the machine in it and slaying the H.A.M helpers, the player and Zanik battle the level 50 Sigmund. Using a [[ring of life]], he escapes death and swears that they will meet again. The ring works even if you reduce his [[Hitpoints]] to 0. During this battle, the player discovers Sigmund is a [[Saradomin]]ist; he uses a [[protection prayer]] called up by the powers of Saradomin. ===Combat Strategy=== Sigmund is rather simple to defeat. First, players must defeat his cronies. Afterwards, both the player and [[Zanik]] can focus on Sigmund alone. Sigmund, probably out of spite of Zanik, will use [[Protect from Missiles]] rather than the [[protection prayer]] against whatever [[combat style]] you use, thus making him vulnerable. If Sigmund proves to be too much of a threat to the player, it is also possible to safespot him using the crates in the room. If the player targets Sigmund with a magic attack before Zanik, he switches prayers to protect magic, then again to protect range from Zanik. This then causes a bug where the player splashes constantly on Sigmund, but he will be vulnerable to ranged attacks, despite having [[Protect from Missiles]] active. {{Bug|When attacking Sigmund with the combat style he is praying against, it possible to deal 1 hitpoint of damage to him rather than 0.}} ==Another Slice of H.A.M.== In this quest, Sigmund and his men ambush [[goblin]]s at the [[Goblin Village]]. After a brief struggle, he captures [[Zanik]] and ties her to the new rail line linking [[Keldagrim]] and [[Dorgesh-Kaan]] in the hopes of starting war between the two cities. However, his plans are foiled by an adventurer who defeats him and manages to get Zanik off the track just before the train arrives. ===Combat Strategy=== This time, Sigmund is slightly harder to defeat. [[Zanik]] will not be able to help you, and his combat level has increased from level 50 to level 64 since the last encounter. He will activate protection prayers depending on which combat style the player attacks with. Use the [[Ancient mace|Ancient Mace]]'s [[Special attacks|Special Attack]] to drain his prayer in order to damage him. You can switch to a different weapon after his prayer is drained. He is immune to the effects of [[ring of recoil]]. ==Pickpocketing== {{Thieving info |name = Sigmund |level = 13 |xp = 0 |type = Pickpocket |tool = None }} {{DropsTableHead}} {{DropsLineSkill|name=Key (The Lost Tribe)|quantity=1|rarity=Always|raritynotes=Only during [[The Lost Tribe]].|skill=Thieving|gemw=No}} {{DropsTableBottom}} ==Dialogue== {{Hastranscript|npc}} ==Gallery== Sigmund eavesdropping.png|After being exposed, Sigmund eavesdrops on the peace treaty's signing. Sigmund plotting.png|Sigmund and Johanhus plotting the flooding of Dorgesh-Kaan. Sigmund teleports.png|Sigmund's ring of life teleports him to safety. Sigmund fighting.png|Sigmund duelling Zanik, protected by prayer. Another Slice Of H.A.M - Sigmund appears.png|Sigmund holding Zanik hostage after blinding her. Another Slice Of H.A.M - Zanik tied up.png|Waiting for the train to arrive...
